perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) Three women are running frantically across a studio space filled with white shelves and clothing racks, looking stressed and busy; one is wearing a white apron dress over a black turtleneck. (2) A woman in a striped shirt and large white-rimmed glasses sits on the floor surrounded by a large pile of wrinkled colorful clothing. (3) The woman in the white apron presents a white, sleek handheld steamer to the camera and the other woman. (4) Detailed close-up shots show the steamer's water tank, a red light indicator, and steam blowing out of the nozzle. (5) The woman in the apron uses the steamer on a black t-shirt on an ironing board and then on a patterned shirt hanging on a rack. (6) She demonstrates folding the steamer into a compact form and holding it up to show its portability. (7) The two women stand together talking enthusiastically while holding the product.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced, high-energy electronic background music begins immediately with sounds of feet running and papers rustling. (2) A female voice speaks in a frustrated, high-pitched tone complaining about wrinkled clothes. (3) A second female voice enters with a bright, professional, and promotional tone, introducing the YAMASAKI steamer. (4) The music continues at a steady upbeat tempo as the speaker details technical specifications like global voltage and steam speed. (5) The sound of steam hissing (SFX) is clearly audible during the demonstration phase. (6) The video ends with a conversational exchange between the two women in a friendly and humorous tone discussing a group purchase.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: 'hahababy' appears at the top as a brand header throughout the video. (2) Hook Text: '新品直播前 有多忙' (How busy before a new product livestream) in large green letters. (3) Decorative/Effect Text: Captions like '款式確認', '梳化', '官網上架', and '衣服樣品' flash on screen to denote tasks. (4) Product Title: '山崎全球電壓通用美型摺疊蒸氣掛燙機' appears in yellow and blue. (5) Functional Text: Subtitles detailing product features like '35秒快速出蒸氣' and '全球電壓通用'. (6) CTA Text: '現在團購中 自己下單' (Group buy in progress, order for yourself).

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro (Chaotic Montage) -> Problem Identification -> Product Solution & Demo -> Closing Conversation

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 3 women are visible during the opening montage and subsequent demo.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A woman with long dark hair wearing a white sleeveless apron dress over a black long-sleeved shirt.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A bright indoor studio with white minimalist shelves, clothing racks, an ironing board, and professional lighting equipment.

audio_production_style.audioTransition: Hard cut with background music bridging

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Montage -> Problem -> Solution -> Demo -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To promote the YAMASAKI folding steamer by demonstrating its convenience, speed, and portability to a targeted audience interested in clothing and travel, specifically leveraging the 'hahababy' influencer brand.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct product demonstration, brand name mention, and group buy call to action.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Frequent use of 'hahababy' logo and energetic, variety-show style text overlays.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video effectively uses a high-stress 'behind-the-scenes' hook to transition into a problem-solving product pitch.
